title: YTP: The Blibble (Part 1)
description:
In this video, God takes a massive dump on the Earth after seeing that weird ass HeGetsUs Super Bowl commercial.

The source material is RedeemedZoomer's "story of the entire Bible, i guess" which can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B5wCziuqnwk&t=34s. It appeared in my recommended videos list and it looked like brilliant source material.

This YouTube Poop was insanely fun to make and I found myself watching parts of it over and over again because I loved it that much. It can't be contained to one video and I want to do much more with this source, so this will be part one of an anthology that will progressively be released.

If you loved this, subscribe for more and if you want to support me on Patreon, do so here:
https://www.patreon.com/Captpan6

And you can also follow me on my socials for all sorts of other cool stuff!
https://twitter.com/captpan6
https://www.tiktok.com/@captpan
tags: history of the bible i guess
